title: The Abyss Rancher: How I Saved the World by Farming
author: Kuang Shan
description: A modern Chengdu delivery driver is pulled into an abyss-infested world where he must farm to survive. Armed with his great-grandfather mysterious book and a vine that grew from blood, he becomes the first human to bridge abyss and surface through agriculture.
